title: Feuilleea canescens
taxonomy: Feuilleea canescens is classified as a species of plant in the family Celastraceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the bittersweet or staff vine family. It is a part of the order Celastrales, which is a group of plants that are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is also classified as a member of the genus Feuilleea, which is a small group of plants that are native to Madagascar. The classification of Feuilleea canescens is further refined to the species level, indicating its unique characteristics and differences from other related plants. Overall, the classification of Feuilleea canescens provides insight into its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species.
